title: Create a KCL package
description: Scaffold a new KCL package (kcl.mod + starter sources). The nx-kcl plugin auto-discovers it via its kcl.mod, so no project registration is needed.

name.description: Package name. Also the Nx project name and the OCI image name it publishes to.
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the KCL package?

directory.description: Parent directory the package is created in.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory should hold the package?

dependencies.description: KCL dependencies to add after creation, each passed to `kcl mod add` (e.g. k8s:1.32.4).
